text.title: Load Balancer High Availability and Cloud Patterns Failure Modes
text.summary: 4 antipatterns from real deployments. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: AZ outage takes the whole service offline.
antipattern.root-cause: Cloud LB pinned to one AZ.
antipattern.fix: Span ≥2 AZs; route 53 / Cloud DNS for cross-region.

antipattern.symptom: Failover plan fails on first real incident.
RTO target 1 min but DNS TTL 5 min — physically impossible.
antipattern.root-cause: DNS failover chosen for sub-TTL RTO.
antipattern.fix: Use cloud LB cross-zone or anycast instead.

antipattern.symptom: Use NLB for path-routing HTTP API — feature missing.
antipattern.fix: Match product to layer (ALB for L7, NLB for L4).
